## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue has `approved-enhancement` label before this PR was opened
- [ ] Built and ran on simulator
- [ ] Tested on device (if applicable)
- [ ] Rust tests pass: `cd Rust/core && cargo test --locked`
- [ ] No new `cargo clippy` warnings introduced
- [ ] Behaviour is consistent across empty and populated states
- [ ] `docs/features/` updated if this closes an open task
